code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut idx = 0
  while idx < n
    let s1 = a.get(idx).ok_or("oob a")?
    let s2 = b.get(idx).ok_or("oob b")?
    let i = string.parse_int(s1).ok_or("parse a")?
    let j = string.parse_int(s2).ok_or("parse b")?
    let s = i + j
    println("#{i}+#{j}=#{s}")
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
